creator: andy.lavr@reactor-xg.kiev.ua
text:
Hi!


 > What version of PostgreSQL are you using?


# pkg_info -E postg\*
postgresql-client-8.4.2_1
postgresql-contrib-8.4.2_2
postgresql-server-8.4.2_1


 > OH, and do you have any existing Bacula ports/packages on this system?


# pkg_info -E bacul\*
bacula-client-3.0.3
bacula-docs-3.0.3
bacula-server-3.0.3


 > Wondering if this is an openseel port


# pkg_info -E openssl\*
openssl-0.9.8l_4


 > No idea what may have caused this. Are you installed ports up to date?

Yes.



Full comlile log:


/usr/ports/sysutils/bacula-server# make
You may use the following build options (or make config): 


   WITH_CLIENT_ONLY=yes  if you only want the file daemon.
   WITH_WXCONSOLE=yes    if you only want a wxGTK based GUI console.
   WITH_MTX=yes          if you want to use mtx instead of chio for 
autochanger control.
   WITH_SQLITE3=yes      if you want SqLite-3 instead of SqLite-2 as the 
database.
   WITH_SFDAEMON=yes  if you want staticly compiled file daemon 
(client).
   WITH_OPENSSL=yes      Enable OpenSSL for encrypted communication.
